source_pr.title: executor: Make union test stable
source_pr.body:
Union executor will read multiple data source parallelly.
Line 622 is unstable and duplicate with line 633.

symptoms: Line 622 is unstable and duplicate with line 633. | r = tk.MustQuery("SELECT 1 AS c UNION select a as c FROM t order by c") (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: Line 622 is unstable and duplicate with line 633. | r = tk.MustQuery("SELECT 1 AS c UNION select a as c FROM t order by c") (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: Line 622 is unstable and duplicate with line 633. | r = tk.MustQuery("SELECT 1 AS c UNION select a as c FROM t order by c") (executor/executor_test.go)
